decision: Chorus prompt timestamp wrong — roles show different incorrect times, not normalized to Boston

steps.action: Chorus prompt timestamp wrong — roles show different incorrect times not normalized to Boston
steps.notes: Root cause: CLAUDE.md told roles to 'construct from system clock' but Claude has no system clock access — it guesses from context. Fix: roles now run 'date' on first response and cache it. CLAUDE.md fragment updated, all 3 roles regenerated at v1.3.10.

Verified: CLAUDE.md fragment updated to run date on first response instead of guessing from context. All 3 roles regenerated at v1.3.10. Fix is correct — Claude has no system clock, must shell out once and cache.
